meaning: n.探险,踏勘,探测,[医](伤处等的)探查,探察术
examples: The moon landing inaugurated a new era in space exploration.
China has earmarked more than $20 billion for oil exploration.
His exploration of the myth brings insight into the American psyche.
But some scientists question whether manned exploration provides the best platform for scientific research.
He described it as a huge success story, following decades of exploration around the Irish coast.
